sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76886" key="pali/mplutos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλίμ-πλῠτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n76886.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">washed up again, vamped up</tr_>: metaph., of a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plagiarist who retouches the works of others</tr_> and passes them off for his own, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κηφὴν π.</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.708</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
